description_long: This object is a compact, tactical firearm with a dark metallic body and a cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The grip is made of a dark, possibly wooden or polymer material, and the upper receiver features a rail system for mounting optics or accessories. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a visible trigger. The overall design is modern, with a short barrel and a silencer, suggesting use in stealth or urban operations. The object lacks a traditional shotgun stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for one-handed operation. The finish is mostly matte black with some glossy highlights on the suppressor and grip.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a suppressor, pistol grip, and rail system, finished in matte black with a dark grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, suppressor, pistol grip, and rail system clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of the first side, with the grip and suppressor visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the top of the receiver, with the suppressor extending forward.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a cylindrical suppressor; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
